projectDescription: Open-source ESP32-C3 firmware for the WiCAN OBD-II and USB CAN bus adapters, enabling WiFi/BLE vehicle diagnostics, MQTT telemetry, ELM327 protocol emulation, and Home Assistant integration.
keyFeatures: WiFi (AP and Station mode) and BLE connectivity
ELM327 v1.5/v2.3 protocol emulation over TCP/BLE
MQTT CAN bus telemetry with JSON frame format
AutoPID: periodic OBD-II PID polling with vehicle profiles
Home Assistant integration via HTTP (no MQTT required)
Sleep mode with voltage-based wake/sleep and battery alerts
WireGuard VPN for secure remote access (WiCAN PRO)
HTTPS destination for custom telemetry endpoints and ABRP
CAN-to-JSON filtering and expression-based data transformation
SD card logging and USB host interface (WiCAN PRO)
Supports RealDash, SavvyCAN, BUSmaster, Car Scanner apps
publicApiSurface: MQTT topic: wican/{device_id}/can/tx — transmit CAN frames (JSON)
MQTT topic: wican/{device_id}/can/rx — receive CAN frames (JSON)
HTTP GET /autopid_data — fetch latest AutoPID OBD data
HTTP web UI at http://192.168.80.1 or device IP
ELM327 command set over TCP port or BLE GATT
RealDash CAN protocol on OBD PIN 6/14
WireGuard VPN configuration and tunnel management
HTTPS POST destination for custom telemetry (JSON or ABRP form-encoded)
Vehicle profile JSON format for AutoPID custom/vendor PIDs
Expression syntax: B0, S0, [B0:B1], arithmetic/bitwise operators
